params.article_prompt: Write a 1500-word article for phuc.net about why local-first AI agents will replace cloud-only SaaS. Cover these points: 1) Privacy advantages of local execution, 2) Cost savings when recipes replace LLM calls, 3) Evidence trails for compliance (FDA Part 11, SOC2), 4) The OAuth3 delegation model. Tone: technical but accessible. Audience: developers and CTOs evaluating AI agent platforms.

notes: Sample prompt for testing article drafting via Gemini
